name: node-mute-stream
title: node-mute-stream
summary: Pass-through stream that can be muted module for Node.js
description:
Pass-through stream that can be muted module for Node.js
node-mute-stream is a basic pass-through stream, but when muted,
the bytes are silently dropped, rather than being passed through.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-mute-stream because Pass-through stream that can be muted module for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-mute-stream as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-mute-stream with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-mute-stream --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
